answers: Email marketing = sending targeted emails to subscribers. Highest ROI of any marketing channel (~$36 for every $1 spent).
Start: choose a platform (Mailchimp/ConvertKit), create a signup form, offer a freebie to attract subscribers, and send weekly.
Tips: write compelling subject lines, personalize, segment your list, provide value, and don't spam. Quality over quantity.
List building: offer free PDF/course/template in exchange for email. Add signup forms to website, social media, and blog posts.
